notes: Curated seed foods. Nutrients are per 100 g of edible food on the stated prep_state basis (dry foods on a dry basis). edible_fraction converts purchased grams to edible grams. Values are simplified from USDA FoodData Central records; fdc_id is set only where a curated mapping is confident, and live FDC lookups are optional enrichment only — curated values always win.

foods.name: White rice, long grain, enriched, dry
